description_long: This is a lifelike model of a duck, featuring a sleek, elongated neck and a streamlined body with a dark brown to black back and lighter underbelly. The head is sharply defined with a white patch running from the throat up the sides of the face, contrasting with the darker crown and nape. The wings are folded neatly against the body, and the webbed feet are a vivid yellow-orange, positioned on a flat, circular gray base. The beak is short and dark, blending smoothly into the facial markings. The overall appearance suggests a waterfowl adapted for both swimming and walking, with realistic feather texturing and naturalistic coloration.
description: A realistic duck model with a dark back, white throat, and yellow webbed feet on a gray base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the duck's curved neck, white throat patch, and one yellow webbed foot extended forward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dark back, tail, and both feet visible from behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the neck arched, white underbelly, and both feet clearly visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the duck's chest, both webbed feet, and the symmetrical white and dark facial markings.
